package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationTemporaryByteSliceForStringWrite() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_temporary_byte_slice_for_string_write"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag []byte(string) conversions used only to write strings to writers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
